3026471.title: Pitch to premiere - sieda
3026471.description: Pitch to Premiere follows previous winners of the 'The Pitch' competition as they complete their project. This time we're going to focus on the winning film, 'Sieda' by The Pitch: Cannes 2018 winner Vanessa Pellegrin.
